sections.one_line: Reason the catalog is prebuilt so installs avoid rescanning docs and slow startup work
Core runtime and CI invariants for baked data, hash validation, and explicit drift handling
Workflow for regenerating the docs catalog and enforcing freshness before commits
Catalog file layout mirroring the docs tree and pairing catalog updates with doc changes
JSON schema for the catalog manifest and its deterministic entry ordering
JSON schema for documentation artifacts and section metadata

Recovery hatch for triggering live catalog scans when the baked artifact is missing or stale.
Unchanged live cataloging path for data/references and its components; only docs/ is intercepted at bring-up
Catalog freshness verification for pytest and CI
Full live test of baked catalog hydration, drift detection, and freshness checks
